data.name: App_Title
data.value: Backdrop for Codex

data.name: App_Description
data.value: A private, local wallpaper layer for Codex.

data.name: Action_SelectMedia
data.value: Choose media

data.name: Action_ApplyChanges
data.value: Apply changes

data.name: Action_ApplyAndLaunch
data.value: Apply & launch Codex

data.name: Action_Cancel
data.value: Cancel

data.name: Action_PauseVideo
data.value: Pause video

data.name: Action_ResumeVideo
data.value: Resume video

data.name: Action_RestoreOfficial
data.value: Restore official background

data.name: Action_Retry
data.value: Retry

data.name: Action_Settings
data.value: Settings

data.name: Action_Remove
data.value: Remove

data.name: Action_ClearRecent
data.value: Clear recent

data.name: Action_Close
data.value: Close

data.name: Action_Confirm
data.value: Confirm

data.name: Action_Reset
data.value: Reset

data.name: Action_LearnMore
data.value: Learn more

data.name: Section_Preview
data.value: Preview

data.name: Section_Wallpaper
data.value: Wallpaper

data.name: Section_RecentMedia
data.value: Recent media

data.name: Section_Appearance
data.value: Appearance

data.name: Section_SafetyPrivacy
data.value: Safety & privacy

data.name: Section_About
data.value: About

data.name: Section_DangerZone
data.value: Danger zone

data.name: Label_Fit
data.value: Image fit

data.name: Label_PanelOpacity
data.value: Panel opacity

data.name: Label_Blur
data.value: Background blur

data.name: Label_Theme
data.value: App theme

data.name: Theme_System
data.value: Use system setting

data.name: Theme_Light
data.value: Light

data.name: Theme_Dark
data.value: Dark

data.name: Fit_Cover
data.value: Fill frame

data.name: Fit_Contain
data.value: Show entire image

data.name: Media_Image
data.value: Image

data.name: Media_Video
data.value: Video

data.name: Media_None
data.value: No media selected

data.name: Hint_DropMedia
data.value: Drop one image or video here

data.name: Hint_SupportedFormats
data.value: PNG, JPEG, WebP, MP4, or WebM

data.name: Hint_NoMedia
data.value: Choose media to start designing your wallpaper.

data.name: Hint_NoRecentMedia
data.value: Your recently used media will appear here.

data.name: Hint_MissingMedia
data.value: This file is no longer available on this device.

data.name: Status_Ready
data.value: Ready

data.name: Status_ChangesPending
data.value: Preview updated. Apply when you are ready.

data.name: Status_SavedNotActive
data.value: Settings are saved, but the wallpaper is not active.

data.name: Status_Active
data.value: Wallpaper is active.

data.name: Status_Paused
data.value: Video wallpaper is paused.

data.name: Status_Restored
data.value: The official Codex background has been restored.

data.name: Status_Canceled
data.value: The operation was canceled.

data.name: Status_ShortcutCreated
data.value: The enhanced-launch shortcut is ready on your desktop.

data.name: Status_ShortcutFailed
data.value: The wallpaper is active, but the desktop shortcut could not be updated.

data.name: Status_ClosingToTray
data.value: Backdrop for Codex is still running in the notification area.

data.name: OperationStage_Validating
data.value: Validating media and compatibility…

data.name: OperationStage_Launching
data.value: Launching Codex…

data.name: OperationStage_Discovering
data.value: Discovering the local Codex window…

data.name: OperationStage_Applying
data.value: Applying wallpaper…

data.name: Stage_Validating
data.value: Validating media and Codex…

data.name: Stage_Launching
data.value: Launching Codex securely…

data.name: Stage_Discovering
data.value: Discovering the local Codex endpoint…

data.name: Stage_Applying
data.value: Applying wallpaper and glass effects…

data.name: Stage_Restoring
data.value: Restoring the official Codex background…

data.name: Stage_Resetting
data.value: Resetting Backdrop for Codex…

data.name: Status_AppliedTitle
data.value: Wallpaper is active

data.name: Status_AppliedMessage
data.value: Codex is using the saved wallpaper and the enhanced desktop shortcut is ready.

data.name: Status_AppliedShortcutFailedTitle
data.value: Wallpaper active

data.name: Status_AppliedShortcutFailedMessage
data.value: The wallpaper is active, but the desktop shortcut could not be updated. You can retry it.

data.name: Status_AutoLaunchNeedsMediaTitle
data.value: Wallpaper needs attention

data.name: Status_AutoLaunchNeedsMediaMessage
data.value: Choose an available wallpaper before using the enhanced shortcut.

data.name: Status_MissingTitle
data.value: Media unavailable

data.name: Status_MissingMessage
data.value: The saved file no longer exists. Choose another file or remove it from recent media.

data.name: Status_PausedTitle
data.value: Video paused

data.name: Status_PausedMessage
data.value: Codex and the local preview are paused.

data.name: Status_ReadyTitle
data.value: Ready

data.name: Status_ReadyMessage
data.value: Choose local media, tune the glass panel, then apply when ready.

data.name: Status_RecentsClearedTitle
data.value: Recent media cleared

data.name: Status_RecentsClearedMessage
data.value: No wallpaper files were deleted from disk.

data.name: Status_ResetCompleteTitle
data.value: Reset complete

data.name: Status_ResetCompleteMessage
data.value: Settings, recent media, acknowledgement, UI preferences, and the owned shortcut were reset.

data.name: Status_RestoredTitle
data.value: Official background restored

data.name: Status_RestoredMessage
data.value: Saved wallpaper settings remain available for the next launch.

data.name: Status_ResumedTitle
data.value: Video resumed

data.name: Status_ResumedMessage
data.value: Codex and the local preview are playing.

data.name: Status_RiskAcceptedTitle
data.value: Enhanced launch enabled

data.name: Status_RiskAcceptedMessage
data.value: The local debugging-port acknowledgement was saved.

data.name: Status_RiskRequiredTitle
data.value: Review enhanced launch

data.name: Status_RiskRequiredMessage
data.value: Review the local Chromium debugging-port notice before applying.

data.name: Status_RiskRevokedTitle
data.value: Enhanced launch disabled

data.name: Status_RiskRevokedMessage
data.value: Future launches will require acknowledgement again.

data.name: Status_RuntimeStoppedTitle
data.value: Wallpaper connection stopped

data.name: Status_RuntimeStoppedMessage
data.value: The runtime connection ended and the app attempted to restore the official background.

data.name: Status_SavedInactiveTitle
data.value: Saved, not active

data.name: Status_SavedInactiveMessage
data.value: Your wallpaper settings were saved, but Codex did not activate them. Resolve the message above and retry.

data.name: Status_SelectMediaTitle
data.value: Choose a wallpaper

data.name: Status_SelectMediaMessage
data.value: Select an available image or muted video first.

data.name: Status_ShortcutReadyTitle
data.value: Shortcut ready

data.name: Status_ShortcutReadyMessage
data.value: The enhanced desktop shortcut was created or updated.

data.name: Risk_Title
data.value: Allow local Codex debugging?

data.name: Risk_Summary
data.value: This feature starts Codex with a local Chromium debugging endpoint.

data.name: Risk_Detail
data.value: The endpoint is limited to this device and remains available until Codex exits. Backdrop verifies the official package and a reviewed version before connecting.

data.name: Risk_Acknowledgement
data.value: I understand and want to continue

data.name: Risk_Revoked
data.value: The acknowledgement has been revoked. You will be asked again before the next enhanced launch.

data.name: Settings_ThemeDescription
data.value: Follow Windows by default, including high-contrast mode.

data.name: Settings_RiskDescription
data.value: Review or revoke the local debugging acknowledgement.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyDescription
data.value: Media stays on this device and is served only through an authenticated loopback address.

data.name: Settings_Licenses
data.value: Open-source licenses

data.name: Settings_ResetTitle
data.value: Reset Backdrop for Codex?

data.name: Settings_ResetDescription
data.value: This restores the official background, clears settings and recent media, revokes acknowledgement, resets UI preferences, and removes only a shortcut verified as owned by this app.

data.name: About_NonAffiliation
data.value: An independent project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by OpenAI.

data.name: Tray_Open
data.value: Open Backdrop for Codex

data.name: Tray_Apply
data.value: Apply wallpaper

data.name: Tray_Restore
data.value: Restore official background

data.name: Tray_Exit
data.value: Exit

data.name: Tray_FirstCloseTitle
data.value: Still running

data.name: Tray_FirstCloseMessage
data.value: Backdrop for Codex moved to the notification area so the wallpaper can stay active.

data.name: Error_Title
data.value: Something needs attention

data.name: Error_Unexpected_Message
data.value: The action could not be completed.

data.name: Error_Unexpected_Recovery
data.value: Try again. If the problem continues, restart Backdrop for Codex.

data.name: Error_OperationCanceled_Message
data.value: The current operation stopped.

data.name: Error_OperationCanceled_Recovery
data.value: You can retry when you are ready.

data.name: Error_PreferencesReadFailed_Message
data.value: Appearance preferences could not be read, so safe defaults are being used.

data.name: Error_PreferencesReadFailed_Recovery
data.value: Choose your preferences again to replace the unreadable file.

data.name: Error_PreferencesWriteFailed_Message
data.value: Appearance preferences could not be saved.

data.name: Error_PreferencesWriteFailed_Recovery
data.value: Check access to your local app-data folder, then retry.

data.name: Error_PreferencesResetFailed_Message
data.value: Appearance preferences could not be reset.

data.name: Error_PreferencesResetFailed_Recovery
data.value: Close other instances and retry.

data.name: Error_WallpaperSettingsReadFailed_Message
data.value: Wallpaper settings could not be read, so safe defaults are being used.

data.name: Error_WallpaperSettingsReadFailed_Recovery
data.value: Select media and apply again to rebuild the settings file.

data.name: Error_WallpaperSettingsWriteFailed_Message
data.value: Wallpaper settings could not be saved.

data.name: Error_WallpaperSettingsWriteFailed_Recovery
data.value: Check access to your local app-data folder, then retry.

data.name: Error_WallpaperConfigurationInvalid_Message
data.value: One or more wallpaper settings are outside the supported range.

data.name: Error_WallpaperConfigurationInvalid_Recovery
data.value: Review the wallpaper controls and retry.

data.name: Error_MediaInvalid_Message
data.value: The selected file is missing, unreadable, or not a supported image or video.

data.name: Error_MediaInvalid_Recovery
data.value: Choose a valid PNG, JPEG, WebP, MP4, or WebM file.

data.name: Error_RiskAcknowledgementRequired_Message
data.value: Enhanced launch needs your acknowledgement before local debugging can be enabled.

data.name: Error_RiskAcknowledgementRequired_Recovery
data.value: Review the safety notice and confirm if you want to continue.

data.name: Error_CodexAlreadyRunning_Message
data.value: Codex was already running, so Backdrop did not attach to it.

data.name: Error_CodexAlreadyRunning_Recovery
data.value: Exit Codex completely, then apply the wallpaper again.

data.name: Error_CodexUnavailable_Message
data.value: The reviewed official Codex installation could not be found.

data.name: Error_CodexUnavailable_Recovery
data.value: Install or repair the official Codex app, then retry.

data.name: Error_CodexVersionUnsupported_Message
data.value: This Codex version has not been reviewed for compatibility.

data.name: Error_CodexVersionUnsupported_Recovery
data.value: Use a supported release of Codex or wait for a Backdrop update.

data.name: Error_EndpointAmbiguous_Message
data.value: More than one verified local Codex debugging endpoint was found.

data.name: Error_EndpointAmbiguous_Recovery
data.value: Exit every Codex process, then retry once.

data.name: Error_EndpointTimedOut_Message
data.value: Codex did not expose its verified local window in time.

data.name: Error_EndpointTimedOut_Recovery
data.value: Wait for Codex to finish closing, then retry.

data.name: Error_MediaLoadFailed_Message
data.value: Codex could not load the selected media.

data.name: Error_MediaLoadFailed_Recovery
data.value: Choose another local file or retry after closing Codex.

data.name: Error_WallpaperApplyFailed_Message
data.value: The settings were saved, but the wallpaper could not be activated.

data.name: Error_WallpaperApplyFailed_Recovery
data.value: Close Codex completely and retry the saved wallpaper.

data.name: Error_WallpaperRestoreFailed_Message
data.value: The official background could not be confirmed as restored.

data.name: Error_WallpaperRestoreFailed_Recovery
data.value: Retry, or exit Codex completely to remove the injected page.

data.name: Error_ShortcutCreateFailed_Message
data.value: The wallpaper is ready, but the enhanced-launch shortcut could not be created.

data.name: Error_ShortcutCreateFailed_Recovery
data.value: Retry from Settings after checking access to your desktop.

data.name: Error_ShortcutRemoveFailed_Message
data.value: The app-owned enhanced-launch shortcut could not be removed.

data.name: Error_ShortcutRemoveFailed_Recovery
data.value: Close other apps using the shortcut, then retry the reset.

data.name: Error_UnsupportedPlatform_Message
data.value: Backdrop for Codex requires Windows 11 on x64 hardware.

data.name: Error_UnsupportedPlatform_Recovery
data.value: Run the app on a supported Windows device.

data.name: Error_AccessDenied_Message
data.value: Windows denied access needed for this action.

data.name: Error_AccessDenied_Recovery
data.value: Check file permissions and retry.
